title: Monday.com does NOT have a RAID Log Template (Risks, Issues, Actions Depdencies)

posts.author: APLUSMikeG (Michael Green)
posts.cookedHtml:
Why doesn’t Monday.com have a RAID Log template ? It says it does on this article but that’s FALSE
https://monday.com/blog/project-management/raid-project-management-template/

As the template is ONLY For Risks i.e. A Risks Register.

I note I found this community article as well as various other articles complaining

Ability to create a RAID log Platform discussions
There isn’t an ability to have a condensed RAID log that can track Risk/Actions/Issues/Decisions/Dependencies. Due to being unable to rename groups, it makes it really hard to have one workbook to track all these things, and takes up more time for PMs to have to go through different workbooks to update each log. It would be good if you can make different groups with different names in the tables to track these in one place.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @APLUSMikeG , I see the gap here with the template you’ve highlighted as it only has risks and not the Actions, Issues & Decisions. I am a monday.com ambassador, and have access to fellow ambassadors. I’ll ask if/how this can be updated.

posts.author: Matt_Frost (Dr Matt Frost - www.frostgroup.uk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Whilst monday look into this, have you tried having a look at monday spaces?
These are workspace templates that power users have created, which often can be a little more detailed or in-depth as they are usually created by people who saw a need for it.

Once downloaded you can also usually tweak them to your own needs, for more specificity

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml: This should be standard, we should not be expected to pay extra for basic PPM functionality.

posts.author: ShelleyDonovan (Shelley Donovan Ritchie)
posts.cookedHtml: We worked with Empyra to create one. Grab it, modify to Monday.com code. Make it part of the Project, Program, Portfolio std offering. This is standard issue in PPM tools.

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi again @APLUSMikeG , I have found a fellow ambassador who has their own board with this need filled. We are going to collaborate and refine it so it can be shared as a template.

posts.author: ClaireKennedy (Claire Kennedy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! Did this template of RAID log get added to the Monday templates? I can’t see mention of a RAID template when searching.
Thanks!

posts.author: jperminas (Jenna Perminas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Wally,

Any updates on this collab from April?

posts.author: WLane (Wally Lane)
posts.cookedHtml: hi Jenna @ClaireKennedy, I’m not a member of the ambassadors group anymore, however I tracked down the ambassador who was working on this and asked for an update.

posts.author: BrendaPiercey (Brenda Piercey)
posts.cookedHtml: Asking for update Smartsheet has this standard…any PM tool should
